description: Reference implementation schema source for IEEE 2416-style parameterized power models. This first profile covers RTL macro models used by the mobile CPU example.

traceability.pvt: Operating conditions and scaling elements capture process, voltage, temperature, and validity ranges.
traceability.activity: Activity parameters describe workload events, clock cycles, and optional signal toggles.
traceability.powerState: Power states capture operating mode, supply behavior, clock behavior, isolation, and retention.
traceability.architecture: Design parameters capture block hierarchy, domain binding, bit widths, memories, and registers.
traceability.executableModel: Power components provide machine-readable leakage, clock, event, and toggle coefficients.
traceability.contributors: Power contributors map each coefficient to its physical or architectural driver, including PVT, voltage, frequency, state, and workload dependencies.
